title: International Students Office - Visa and Residence Permit
content:
International Students Office - Visa and Residence Permit

Visa Procedures

Students who wish to study in Turkey, need to obtain a Student Visa from the nearest Turkish Consulate in their countries. Obtaining a Student Visa can take some time, so We are advising our students to apply for a v,sa as sson as they got their Acceptance Letters. You can learn about the particulars ob your countries visa regulations from the following web site:

http://www.mfa.gov.tr/visa-information-for-foreigners.en.mfa

You can even apply for any visa online via the following address:

https://www.konsolosluk.gov.tr

Residence Permit Procedures

The most important issue you need to follow up after coming to Turkey is your residence permit and the application process. You need to apply via the official website

https://e-ikamet.goc.gov.tr/

and hand the necessary documents regarding the application at the International Students Departments Residence Permit Specialist. Students can not bring their documents on their own to the Residence Permit Agency, only their universities can forward their information. Syrian Students are the exception to the rule. With your Residence Permit Card and your Foreigner ID Numbers you can manage all your official transactions while living in Turkey.

Your Residence Permit Card can be used when you travel abroad or come back to Turkey and therefore You will not need a Visa for your turkey travels while it is still valid. It is importnat to renew it before the validity ends.

As a student you only pay fort he card, and are exempt from any additional fees.

This content was updated on 23/09/2024.
